Items.Title: Python概念学习点2：实参和参数有什么区别？ | Python Concept Learning Point 2: What is the difference between arguments and parameters?
Items.Description:
哈马修·陈

发表于参数是出现在函数定义中的名称。

  • 参数是实际传递给函数的值。
  • 参数控制应该传递给函数的值（参数）。
    •  def calcaulate_book_cost ( number_of_books ): return number_of_books * 3 print ( calcaulate_book_cost ( 4 ))

    在上面的例子中，number_of_books 是参数，因为它出现在函数的定义中。
    信用

    Python doc (Accessed at 2022 JUN 09) Python 文档（于 2022 年 6 月 9 日访问）



    原文:

    HHMathewChan

    Posted on Jun 9 • Originally published at rebirthwithcode.tech

    • Parameters are the names appear in the function definition.
    • Arguments are the value that actually pass to a function.
    • Parameter control what value(parameter) should pass to a function. 
    def calcaulate_book_cost (number_of_books): return number_of_books * 3 print(calcaulate_book_cost(4))

    In the above example, number_of_books is the parameter, since it appears in the definition of the function.
    4 is the argument, since it appear in the function calling and it is the value actually pass to the function to process.

    Credit

    Python doc (Accessed at 2022 JUN 09)
